evals.prompt: Scan the codebase for TODOs and create Linear issues
evals.expected_output: Searches for TODO/FIXME/HACK comments in src/, creates Linear issues with correct team ID, project ID, priority, estimate, and labels

assertions.name: scans-codebase
assertions.description: Searches for // TODO:, // FIXME:, // HACK: comments in src/

assertions.name: priority-mapping
assertions.description: Maps bug/security to Urgent(1), features to High(2), enhancements to Medium(3), polish to Low(4)

assertions.name: summary-table
assertions.description: Prints a summary table with Issue, Title, Priority, Estimate, Linear URL columns

evals.prompt:
Create Linear issues from this task list:
1. Add user avatar upload to settings
2. Fix broken pagination on posts page
3. Refactor analytics hook to use date range parameter
evals.expected_output: Creates parent issue + 3 child issues with correct parentId linkage, priority mapping, and estimates

assertions.name: parent-issue-created
assertions.description: Creates one parent issue for the overall feature set

assertions.name: child-issues-linked
assertions.description: Creates child issues with parentId pointing to the parent issue

assertions.name: bug-priority-correct
assertions.description: Fix broken pagination is mapped to priority 1 (Urgent) with Bug label

assertions.name: feature-priority-correct
assertions.description: Add user avatar upload is mapped to priority 2 (High) with Feature label

assertions.name: refactor-priority-correct
assertions.description: Refactor analytics hook is mapped to priority 4 (Low) with Improvement label

assertions.name: description-format
assertions.description: Child issue descriptions follow the What/Why/Files/Done When format
